name: Aubergines a La Toulousaine (Eggplant a La Toulouse)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggplant into 1/2-inch thick slices.
2. Peel and place the slices on paper towels; sprinkle each generously with salt.
3. Let stand for 30 minutes, then blot dry with paper towels.
4. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
5. Sauté the eggplant in 1/4 cup salad oil until golden brown. Add more oil as needed.
6. Cut the tomatoes into 1/2-inch thick slices and sauté them in the same skillet.
7. In a 10x6x2 inch baking dish, arrange the eggplant and tomatoes in alternating layers (a total of 4 layers), sprinkling each layer with 1/4 teaspoon salt and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
8. Combine the bread cubes with parsley, garlic, 1 tablespoon salad oil, and Parmesan cheese. Toss well.
9. Sprinkle the combined bread mixture over the top layer.
10. Bake for 20 minutes or until the bread cubes are golden brown and the eggplant is tender.
